scripts.dev: echo 'To start development, run "npm run dev:platform" or "npm run dev:admin"' && exit 0
scripts.build:all: npm run build:platform && npm run build:admin
scripts.deploy:platform: npm run build:platform && cd test-platform-react && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy:admin: npm run build:admin && cd admin-panel-react && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:platform && npm run deploy:admin
